result.stdout:
Usage: cito [OPTIONS] -o FILE INPUT.ci
Options:
-l c       Translate to C
-l cpp     Translate to C++
-l cs      Translate to C#
-l d       Translate to D
-l java    Translate to Java
-l js      Translate to JavaScript
-l py      Translate to Python
-l swift   Translate to Swift
-l ts      Translate to TypeScript
-l d.ts    Translate to TypeScript declarations
-l cl      Translate to OpenCL C
-o FILE    Write to the specified file
-n NAME    Specify C++/C# namespace, Java package or C name prefix
-D NAME    Define conditional compilation symbol
-r FILE.ci Read the specified source file but don't emit code
-I DIR     Add directory to resource search path
--help     Display this information
--version  Display version information

commands.payload:
Usage: cito [OPTIONS] -o FILE INPUT.ci
Options:
-l c       Translate to C
-l cpp     Translate to C++
-l cs      Translate to C#
-l d       Translate to D

-l js      Translate to JavaScript
-l py      Translate to Python
-l swift   Translate to Swift
-l ts      Translate to TypeScript
-l d.ts    Translate to TypeScript declarations
-l cl      Translate to OpenCL C
-o FILE    Write to the specified file
-n NAME    Specify C++/C# namespace, Java package or C name prefix
-D NAME    Define conditional compilation symbol
-r FILE.ci Read the specified source file but don't emit code
